title: Innovative educational technology for visually impaired learners using a 3D-Printed foot reflexology robot
author: Nabudda, Nabudda, et al.

steps.title: Method details
steps.instruction: The development of a 3D-printed foot model for teaching reflexology to visually impaired learners follows a systematic and reproducible digital-to-physical workflow that integrates anatomical modelling, additive manufacturing, and embedded electronic systems.
